entries.quote: India is in a 'Goldilocks moment' marked by robust economic growth and rising global confidence, reflecting a well-balanced and resilient economic environment.
entries.signal: Bakhshi sees macro tailwinds in India's growth trajectory and signals confidence in the economy's stability—relevant for Scapia's exposure to India's travel & fintech sectors
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management believes India's macroeconomic conditions and digital infrastructure (Aadhaar, UPI) create sustained growth opportunities; positioning to capitalize on financial inclusion expansion.
